topics.label: Setup
topics.description: Use miniKanren in Scheme, Racket, Clojure, or Python. A tiny relational programming language.

topics.label: Goals & run
topics.description: run* to find all solutions, run n for first n. Goals succeed or fail.

topics.label: == (Unification)
topics.description: Unify logic variables with values. The fundamental operation.

topics.label: conde (Disjunction)
topics.description: Try multiple alternatives. conde is miniKanren's OR.

topics.label: fresh (Logic Variables)
topics.description: Introduce new logic variables with fresh.

topics.label: Relational Arithmetic
topics.description: Define addition, multiplication as relations. Run forwards and backwards.
